name: Avita Cassiana
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial female vampire wearing simple clothing appropriate to a monk. Displays the physical traits associated with vampirism.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: devoted, corrupted

Role: Vampire and former worshipper of Azura; member of the Afflicted Brethren in Gutted Mine.

Home Location Information: Resides within Gutted Mine alongside the other members of the Afflicted Brethren.

Equipment and Abilities: Fights primarily with unarmed techniques consistent with monk training and relies on physical combat rather than weapons. Displays the supernatural resilience and aggression typical of vampires.

Personality – Afflicted Worshipper: Avita Cassiana was once a follower of Azura and became afflicted with vampirism after taking part in the slaying of a powerful vampire named Dratik. She remains within Gutted Mine with the other Afflicted Brethren, bound by their shared origin and condition. One of the Brethren carries a worn, faded note that preserves the names and identities of the group.

Fate: Avita Cassiana is one of the Afflicted Brethren whom Azura seeks to have released from their curse during her intervention at Gutted Mine.
author: Bethesda
